query:
-- 1. Apollo usage by day (last 30 days)
SELECT DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)) as day,
       COUNT(*) as calls,
       SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failures
FROM apolloApiLog
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) * 1000
GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 30;

-- 1. Apollo usage by day (last 30 days)
SELECT DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)) as day,
       COUNT(*) as calls,
       SUM(CASE WHEN success = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successes,
       SUM(CASE WHEN success = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failures
FROM apolloApiLog
WHERE createdAt > UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)) * 1000
GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 30;
